brand_dna.category: Better-for-you hydration soda: a sparkling drink with electrolytes and organic honey, sold in 12-packs DTC.
brand_dna.core_belief: You don't have to choose between great flavor and feeling great - soda can taste amazing and hydrate you.
proof_points: 180mg essential electrolytes per can (sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium)
Sweetened entirely with 100% organic wildflower honey, no artificial sweeteners
Only 45 calories per can; no sucralose, aspartame, stevia, or HFCS
Caffeine-free and gluten-free; free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, playful better-for-you soda that puts bold flavor first and hydration second - not a performance drink, not a sugar bomb.

voice_pillars.name: Flavor-First Fun
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with taste and enjoyment, treating soda as something fun before it is functional.
voice_pillars.quote: Soda That Tastes Amazing. Hydration Built In.

voice_pillars.name: No-Compromise Confidence
voice_pillars.desc: Positions the drink as proof you can have both flavor and feeling good, without tradeoffs.
voice_pillars.quote: Strive proves you don't have to choose between great flavor and feeling great.

voice_pillars.name: Active and Aspirational
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to movers and doers chasing what's next, tying the drink to an active lifestyle.
voice_pillars.quote: made for the movers, the shakers, and the tastemakers

voice_pillars.name: Playful Escape
voice_pillars.desc: Uses vivid, vacation-style imagery that makes each flavor feel like a small getaway.
voice_pillars.quote: Tropical Recharge is vacation in a can.

phrases: Soda That Tastes Amazing. Hydration Built In.
natural fuel without the jitters or crash

icp: Active, on-the-go adults who love the taste of soda but want cleaner ingredients and everyday hydration, and will pay a premium to enjoy both without compromise.

personas.name: The Everyday Striver
personas.description: Busy doer moving from beach to boardroom who wants a fun, flavorful drink that keeps them hydrated through long days - moved by 'flavor first, hydration built in'.

personas.name: The Clean-Label Swapper
personas.description: Health-aware buyer ditching sugary sodas and artificial sweeteners who is convinced by organic honey, 45 calories, and no HFCS or aspartame.

personas.name: The Casual Refresher
personas.description: Not a gym rat but active and thirsty, drawn to the playful 'vacation in a can' flavors for hikes, errands, and hanging out.

offers: Free shipping on orders over $35 within the United States
Subscribe & Save: 15% off every order, free shipping, early access to new flavors, cancel or edit anytime
First month Subscribe & Save price $16.50 (about $1.38 per can)
30-day return policy; contact within 30 days and 'we'll make it right'
Quality guarantee on defective products: full refund or replacement, prepaid return label
Variety Pack option (6 Tropical + 6 Peach) to try both flavors

allowed.claim: 180mg essential electrolytes per can (sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium)
Sweetened entirely with 100% organic wildflower honey, no artificial sweeteners
No sucralose, aspartame, stevia, or HFCS
Free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives

banned.why: Banned immunity claim for this category; not supported by the label.
Unqualified 'detox' claim is banned in this category.

banned.claim: Burns fat or aids weight loss
banned.why: Banned fat-burning / weight-loss claim not supported by the product.

banned.claim: Treats, prevents, or cures dehydration or any condition
banned.why: Disease-treatment claims are banned; hydration soda cannot claim to treat a medical condition.

banned.claim: The healthiest / cleanest soda you can drink
banned.why: 'Clean' and 'natural' are vague, risky headline claims in this category.

banned.claim: Low sugar soda (as a headline nutrient claim)
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the actual label; use verified per-can figures instead of an unqualified low-sugar claim.
